title: Sieve/Strainer (Pack of 3) | 8cm, 12cm & 18cm | Marine-Grade Stainless Steel | Finest Mesh | Temperature-Proof | No Sharp Edges | Anti-Corrosive | Bend-Proof
features: 💪 𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗩𝗬-𝗗𝗨𝗧𝗬, 𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗠𝗘𝗦𝗛 & 𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗘𝗥-𝗗𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗪𝗘𝗟𝗗𝗦: Built with marine-grade, super-thick & rust-proof stainless steel metal to ensure that these sieves can withstand non-stop commercial-scale use like cooking or baking and still, last for a superlong time | Finest mesh in the whole market to provide the maximum concentration of what you want | Super-durable welds

👍 𝗧𝗘𝗠𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘-𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗢𝗙, 𝗦𝗔𝗙𝗘-𝗧𝗢-𝗨𝗦𝗘 & 𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗟𝗘: Extremely hot water and/or oil? No problem at all! | Handle & ear hanger are heat-resistant so you don’t get burned while handling our sieve | No sharp edges ensure that you never get cut | Long handle so that it’s convenient for you to grip the sieve while staying away from the mess and/or heat | Wide rim so that the food doesn’t easily fall over and so that no food is ever stuck between the mesh and the rim
🔗 𝗔𝗡𝗧𝗜-𝗖𝗢𝗥𝗥𝗢𝗦𝗜𝗩𝗘 & 𝗕𝗘𝗡𝗗-𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗢𝗙: Made-up of anti-corrosive metal to ensure long-lasting life | Super-thick handle, ear hanger, rim & mesh to ensure that these sieves never get bent easily

🍳 𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗞𝗜𝗧𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗡 𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗧𝗡𝗘𝗥: Small size is 8cm (3.15in) which is great for small stuff like tea, coffee, cocktails, spices, sugar, salt, cocoa powder, etc. | Medium size is 12cm (4.75in) which is great for neither small, nor large stuff like oatmeal, cereal, flour, etc. | Large size is 18cm (7.1in) which is great for large stuff like rice, spaghetti, fruits, vegetables, etc.
✅ 𝗪𝗛𝗬 𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗥𝗘𝗭𝟮𝗗𝗢𝗢𝗥: RoHS compliant | REACH compliant | ISO 9001:2015 certified
